central_question: Whether an independently defined reasoning scope instantiates a nontrivial representation-invariant kernel that survives contrast, ablation, reconstruction, cost accounting, and equivalence or minimality analysis.

frozen_hypotheses.statement: At least one nontrivial common kernel exists over the declared post-W5 reasoning scope.
A successful kernel survives every transformation in the frozen admissible-representation class up to declared equivalence.
A successful kernel performs a reasoning-relevant role not discharged by the frozen contrast class or GREL-001 alone.
A successful kernel cannot be removed without loss or recovered only through an explicitly equivalent reintroduction under the frozen reconstruction class.
Successful kernels admit a minimality, equivalence, incomparability, or no-minimum classification under a frozen candidate universe and cost preorder.
No single nontrivial universal kernel exists under the frozen assumptions.

workstreams.name: scope_extension
workstreams.purpose: Extend beyond the bounded S_core theorem one feature family at a time without importing the desired kernel into admission rules.

workstreams.name: alternative_vocabulary_competition
workstreams.purpose: Test materially different non-FARA vocabularies against the same frozen commitments, preservation contract, and full machinery ledger.

workstreams.name: representation_invariance
workstreams.purpose: Determine whether candidate commitments survive materially different encodings rather than merely retaining labels.
workstreams.failure_rule: Any admissible transformation that destroys the commitment without violating the frozen source contract refutes invariance for that candidate and scope.

workstreams.name: global_necessity_and_reconstruction
workstreams.purpose: Search for elimination, derivation, replacement, and equivalent reintroduction across the declared reconstruction class.

workstreams.name: minimality_equivalence_and_no_go
workstreams.purpose: Classify successful candidates under a frozen universe, equivalence relation, and cost preorder.

workstreams.name: independent_review_replication_and_adversarial_search
workstreams.purpose: Separate independent proof review, independent technical replication, adversarial conceptual replication, and cross-context replication.

first_execution_unit: Freeze and execute one extension-feature family before broadening the scope further.
nonclaims: The current candidate registry is exhaustive
Any FARA primitive is globally necessary
The W5 representation theorem advances USD by logical implication
Independent review or independent replication has occurred
